# clang trunk: assertion "Null bytes are not allowed in names" in Value::setNameImpl when GNU asm function label contains embedded \0

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173683
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:codegen, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T00:34:01Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/8hWcfeKzz

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

### Comment 2 - shafik

Goes back to clang-3.5 like a duplicate, although the backtrace is not identical most everything else looks very close. If a fix for the dup does not fix this, we can reopen then.

Please do a better job of looking for dups, especially fuzzing based bugs which often will hit the same code paths over and over again.

---
